name: neuronsearchlab
description: Manage and analyze a NeuronSearchLab recommendation workspace.

interface.longDescription: Inspect and manage your NeuronSearchLab recommendation workspace. Search catalogue items, explain rankings, configure contexts, pipelines, rules and segments, run experiments and training jobs, and review performance analytics.
defaultPrompt: Explain why an item ranks for a user in my NSL workspace.
Review my recommendation contexts and active pipelines.
Summarize the latest experiment and ranking metrics.
